mapper.insert: INSERT INTO machines ( machine_name, contractor_id, current_project_id, is_company_property, is_assigned, plate_number, serial_number, value ) VALUES ( #{machineName}, #{contractorId}, #{currentProjectId}, #{isCompanyProperty}, #{isAssigned}, #{plateNumber}, #{serialNumber}, #{value} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, machine_name AS machineName, contractor_id AS contractorId, current_project_id AS currentProjectId, is_company_property AS isCompanyProperty, is_assigned AS isAssigned, plate_number AS plateNumber, serial_number AS serialNumber, value FROM machines WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE machines SET machine_name = #{machineName}, contractor_id = #{contractorId}, current_project_id = #{currentProjectId}, is_company_property = #{isCompanyProperty}, is_assigned = #{isAssigned}, plate_number = #{plateNumber}, serial_number = #{serialNumber}, value = #{value} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, machine_name AS machineName, contractor_id AS contractorId, current_project_id AS currentProjectId, is_company_property AS isCompanyProperty, is_assigned AS isAssigned, plate_number AS plateNumber, serial_number AS serialNumber, value FROM machines
